category_sources: Official Lutgen Wiki describes detailed CLI documentation and examples for Lutgen; source_facts describes LUT generation/application for color palettes.
source_facts.description: Blazingly fast interpolated LUT generator and applicator for color palettes.
display_name_sources: Official documentation site is titled Lutgen Wiki.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository is the README fallback.
Official project homepage redirects to Lutgen Wiki with CLI, examples, lore, studio, and tips sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already set to https://github.com/ozwaldorf/lutgen-rs; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository description says lutgen-rs is for arbitrary and popular color palettes.
Official Lutgen Wiki lists CLI documentation, examples, and Lutgen Studio; source_facts describes a LUT generator/applicator for color palettes.
